title: Resolving Moral Dilemmas
scenario: A manager is faced with a moral dilemma in which they must choose between two conflicting values: fairness and efficiency. The manager has limited resources and must allocate them to maximize performance. However, allocating resources in a way that maximizes efficiency may lead to unfair treatment of certain employees.
constraints: Must include a clear justification for the chosen course of action
Must consider the impact on all stakeholders

evaluationCriteria.description: The chosen course of action prioritizes fairness over efficiency.
The justification for the chosen course of action is clear and well-reasoned.
The chosen course of action considers the impact on all stakeholders.
